title: Ayush University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Ayush University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Ayush University Result 2026 declared for B.A.S.L.P. 4th Semester and 6th Semester Examination Jan 2026 (with tabulation) on the official website - ddumhsaucg.ac.in on 25-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Ayush University result.

content.text: Deendayal Upadhyay Memorial Health Sciences and Ayush University of Chhattisgarh has officially released the Ayush University Result 2026 for the B.A.S.L.P. Fourth Semester and Sixth Semester Examinations January 2026 (with tabulation). These undergraduate results for Bachelor in Audiology and Speech Language Pathology have been published online in tabulated format for all affiliated colleges. Ayush University Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - ddumhsaucg.ac.in.

Students can check and download their BASLP 4th and 6th semester marksheets by visiting the university result portal, selecting the relevant exam and entering their roll number or searching within the tabulation PDF. After viewing the provisional result, they should carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks, total marks and pass/fail status and contact the university or college if any discrepancy is observed.

Ayush University has provided a focused BASLP result update for the January 2026 examination session, covering mid and final stage semesters of the programme. The availability of with tabulation results allows colleges and students to see complete mark distributions for the entire batch.

Ayush University hosts its BASLP and other health sciences results on a central result portal where exam-wise links are displayed. From there, students can open the B.A.S.L.P. Fourth Semester and Sixth Semester January 2026 result files (with tabulation) and view their marks.

links.label: Result of B.A.S.L.P. Fourth Semester Examination Jan 2026 (With Tabulation)
Result of B.A.S.L.P. Sixth Semester Examination Jan 2026 (With Tabulation)

sections.heading: How to Download Ayush University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your Ayush University BASLP Result 2026:

items: On the list of results, locate the links titled: Result of B.A.S.L.P. Fourth Semester Examination Jan-2026 (With Tabulation) Result of B.A.S.L.P. Sixth Semester Examination Jan-2026 (With Tabulation)
Result of B.A.S.L.P. Fourth Semester Examination Jan-2026 (With Tabulation)
Result of B.A.S.L.P. Sixth Semester Examination Jan-2026 (With Tabulation)
Click on the View Result link for your respective semester to open the result/tabulation file (PDF or web view).
If it is a PDF, press Ctrl+F and enter your roll number or name to quickly find your record.
Note your subject-wise marks, total marks, percentage and overall result status (pass/fail, distinction etc., as applicable).
Download or print the tabulated result page or your marks entry for future academic and documentation purposes.
